I would like to request a temporary change in my work schedule for the next two weeks. I have enrolled in an evening English course that I believe will improve my communication skills at work. To ensure my tasks are covered, I will finish all urgent work earlier in the day and coordinate with my teammates when needed. Thank you for your understanding and support
writing.task2: I agree that public libraries should prioritise digital collections over print. One reason is that digital books are easier to access for many people, especially those who cannot visit the library in person. For example, students can download e-books at any time and study from home, which saves both time and travel costs. This makes learning more flexible and inclusive, so digital collections are more useful in today’s world
writing.task3: The line chart shows strong growth in the number of users of a language-learning app between 2018 and 2025. In 2018, the figure was only 1 million, but it increased steadily and reached 12 million by 2025. There were sharp rises in 2020 and 2023, when the number of users jumped more quickly compared to other years. For example, growth between 2019 and 2020 was much larger than between 2018 and 2019
